paths.A_modal: spectral.rs eigen-basis (laplacian_eigenmodes/topk_symmetric) truncated to r modes
paths.B_dct: analytic cos(πp(x+0.5)/w)·cos(πq(y+0.5)/h) DCT basis, same L=D−A operator
paths.C_stencil: reference finite-difference diffusion step (authority for full-field evolution)

reconciliation.T3_modal_advance_matches_stencil: PASS ≤1e-9 (modal Euler == stencil projected, r modes)

verdict.accuracy: A_rms == B_rms to float64 on every full grid (identical basis, T1/T2/T3)
verdict.precompute: DCT wins: B_pre=0 (analytic) vs A_pre=0.6-6.9ms; 690ms on masked 60-node grid
verdict.per_frame: A and B equal; both cheaper than stencil C at r<=12 (2-13us vs 33-185us); at r->n B's O(n log n) FFT would beat A's O(r*n)
verdict.generality: modal A is the ONLY path defined on masked/shaped domains where DCT B is undefined
verdict.recommendation: Use DCT for full-grid render (free, exact). Use modal eigenmodes (A) only for shaped/masked fields and spectral low-mode advance. C (stencil) stays the authority for full-field evolution.
